case_title: AMBROSIO RICO VS. TEAM CINCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICO, AMBROSIO AS TO DEFENDANT TEAM CINCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA TEAM CINCO SPORTS ( A SPORT & ENTERTAINMENT PROMOTION COMPANY) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICO, AMBROSIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEAM CINCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA TEAM CINCO SPORTS ( A SPORT & ENTERTAINMENT PROMOTION COMPANY) $25,043.01 PRINCIPAL, $216.98 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,594.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
